CREATE TABLE test_decimals (id INT, num_value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_decimals (id, num_value) VALUES (1, 12345.67);
INSERT INTO test_decimals (id, num_value) VALUES (2, -98765.43);
INSERT INTO test_decimals (id, num_value) VALUES (3, 0.00);
INSERT INTO test_decimals (id, num_value) VALUES (4, 9999999999.99);
SELECT * FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value > 10000.00;
SELECT id, num_value FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value BETWEEN -1000.00 AND 1000.00;
SELECT id, num_value FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(num_value) FROM test_decimals;
SELECT MAX(num_value) FROM test_decimals WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value < 0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value = 12345.67;
CREATE TABLE test_decimals2 (id INT, num_value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_decimals2 (id, num_value) VALUES (1, 2500.75);
INSERT INTO test_decimals2 (id, num_value) SELECT id, num_value FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value > 10000.00;
DELETE FROM test_decimals WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value < 0 LIMIT 1);
SELECT d1.id, d1.num_value, d2.num_value FROM test_decimals d1 JOIN test_decimals2 d2 ON d1.id = d2.id WHERE d1.num_value > 1000;
SELECT id, SUM(num_value) FROM test_decimals GROUP BY id HAVING SUM(num_value) > 10000.00;
UPDATE test_decimals SET num_value = num_value * 3.14 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value IN (SELECT num_value FROM test_decimals2 ORDER BY num_value DESC LIMIT 5);
SELECT * FROM test_decimals WHERE num_value < ANY (SELECT num_value FROM test_decimals2);
